series_metadata.series_description: Requests made by the news media for information and public records. They include the requestors name, media affiliation, request, date of request, description of information provided and if applicable, information on how to contact the requestor with said information. Such records may also include additional information to fulfill a specific request.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep one year after the end of the calendar year, in which the request was made, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
